text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this point, we've assembled enough members
to take on the Unity Cup in earnest!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: How excitin'! I'm so pumped to train as a team!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today is a truly auspicious day! I sense success for
us on the horizon!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
What should we do for training today? Maybe we
can play tag together!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-will I be able to keep up with everyone, I
wonder?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We certainly make for a unique pack. It's full
speed ahead from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: One! Two! Three! Four!

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Five! Six! Seven! Eight!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Two... two... three... four...

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: Five! Six! Seven! Eight!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Being with y'all really gets my blood
pumping!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's helpful to be able to watch everyone else
while training! It makes me more conscious of
what I should work on myself!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: It's like we're all mirroring each other!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, she can stretch so far... I have to work hard
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The team's synergy is strong, and all the members
encourage one another as they excitedly work
through my training regimen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm feeling pretty good about how smoothly
things are going, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's stop here! Time for a break!

text_block_list.name: Team Members
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh me, oh my... To say or not to say...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... Our jog is currently taking us in a
south-southeasterly direction, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Today's lucky direction is north-northwest—the
opposite direction. I thought it might be more
auspicious to change our route...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, I don't want to cause a hassle for everyone
by making last-minute changes...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, forget I said anything! The team decided
the route together, so we should just stick to it!
It'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And it's not just Matikanefukukitaru whose
behavior is off...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... what should I do?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! I, um...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I feel like our jogging pace might be a bit fast for
some of us...
choice_data_list: Why don't you speak up about it?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I'm not sure if anyone else thinks the
same way...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Y-you know what, never mind! Just ignore what I
said!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She runs off before I can say anything more...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Do you think I should stop talking
so much?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I see something interesting, like a
butterfly, I just wanna tell everyone else about it.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But when I point things out during training,
everyone gets startled or stops in the middle of
their exercise.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I thought, maybe... Actually, you know what?
I've made up my mind! I won't talk anymore
during training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even Taiki Shuttle, who has been genuinely
having a blast during training, is burdened with
troubles.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniff...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Traineeeer! Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can barely understand her through all the crying,
so I calm her down and lend her a sympathetic
ear.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I was thinkin' of holding a party for everyone so
we could get to know each other better, y'see...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But when I went to invite them after training...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, y'all! I was thinkin'...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oof... I've never felt so tired in my life...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Me neither...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: When they said that, I... just couldn't ask 'em!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If it was any other time, I would've gotten things
fired up anyways and dragged 'em along with
me...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I can't be steppin' on any toes an' forcin' them
to spend time with me when we still got so much
work to do...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I already decorated the room, though! I can't bear
goin' back alone after all this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite how much fun they're having doing team
training, it seems they're all feeling the pressure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for Team Zenith...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
200 meters left! Your pace is slowing! Don't waste
energy raising your knees—visualize yourself
kicking off the ground instead!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Raaaah!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Huff… huff...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very good. You're all done with the regimen I
prepared today.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
To finish off, I want to compare your best times
today against the target times I previously set for
you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
If you intend to reach your goals, it's vital to
compare your current progress with your targets
on a regular basis. Now, who wants to go first?

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
I will. My target time to run 3,000 meters is 3
minutes 6.2 seconds. My best time today was 3
minutes 10.3 seconds.

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
My target time to run 2,400 meters is 2 minutes
26.4 seconds. My time today was 2 minutes 30
seconds exactly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The members of Team Zenith announce their
target and current times one after another.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Very good. If we remain on track, everyone
should reach their target times within eighteen
months.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I am sure you've integrated this into your routines
by now, but don't forget to go over your work
and write up your reflections on today.

text_block_list.name: Team Zenith
text_block_list.text: Yes, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Good. That's all for today.

text_block_list.name: Team Zenith
text_block_list.text: Thank you, ma'am!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm beat! I can't wait to get in the shower!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: I don't feel like I should be this exhausted, but... Oh well, I guess this is all part of Trainer Kashimoto's calculations!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text: Trainer Kashimoto really is incredible...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Team Zenith is hard at work under Ms.
Kashimoto's instruction and training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm starting to worry whether or not we'll be able
to best them in the Unity Cup at this rate...
